auth.enterCodeWhatsApp: Enter the 6-digit code sent via WhatsApp to {{phone}}
auth.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid phone number

onboarding.welcomeDescription: Your community safety network. In an emergency, one button alerts your trusted circle and shares your location.
onboarding.displayNameDescription: This name will be shown to your circle members when you send an alert.
onboarding.locationDescription: El Boton needs your location to send help to the right place during an emergency.
onboarding.locationBullet1: Share your exact location when you activate an alert
onboarding.locationBullet2: Help responders find you quickly in an emergency
onboarding.locationBullet3: Connect with nearby El Boton users who can help
onboarding.locationRequiredMessage: El Boton cannot function without location access. This is essential to share your location during emergencies and help responders find you.
onboarding.skipLocationMessage: Without location access, El Boton won't be able to share your location during emergencies or help responders find you. You can enable it later in Settings.
onboarding.saveError: Could not save your information. Please try again.
onboarding.notificationsDescription: Get notified immediately when someone in your circle needs help.
onboarding.notificationsBullet1: Receive instant alerts when circle members activate an emergency
onboarding.notificationsBullet2: Get updates on alert status and responders
onboarding.notificationsBullet3: Never miss a call for help from someone you care about
onboarding.notificationsRequiredMessage: El Boton requires notifications to alert you when someone in your circle needs help. This is essential for the app to work.
onboarding.skipNotificationsMessage: Without notifications, you won't receive alerts when your circle members need emergency help. You can enable them later in Settings.

home.locationPermissionMessage: El Boton needs your location to send help to the right place.
home.cooldownMessage: Please wait {{minutes}} minute(s) before sending another alert.
home.locationError: Could not get your location. Please try again.
home.locationDisabled: Location is off — tap to enable in Settings
home.notificationsDisabled: Notifications are off — you won't receive alerts

bigRedButton.cooldownWait: Please wait before sending another alert

circles.title: Safety Circles
circles.subtitle: Members will be notified when you activate an alert
circles.createHint: Create a circle to add your trusted contacts
circles.createDescription: Choose a name for your safety circle
circles.alreadyInCircle: You are already in this circle
circles.shareMessage:
Join my El Boton safety circle "{{name}}"!

https://api.elbotonapp.com/join/{{code}}
circles.leaveConfirm: Are you sure you want to leave "{{name}}"?
circles.ownerCannotLeave: As the owner, you cannot leave. Delete the circle or transfer ownership first.
circles.testAlertRateLimit: Please wait before sending another test alert
circles.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}"? This will remove all members and cannot be undone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.locationHint: Required to send your location in alerts
settings.enableLocationMessage: Please enable location in your device settings to use El Boton.
settings.enableNotificationsMessage: Please enable notifications in your device settings.
settings.signOutConfirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?
settings.deleteAccountConfirm: This will permanently delete your account and all your data. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteAccountError: Could not delete your account. Please try again.

alert.noResponders: No one responded to this alert
alert.circleNotified: Your circle members have been notified
alert.expandMessage: This will alert El Boton users near your location. Continue?
alert.cancelConfirm: Are you sure? This was a false alarm.
alert.expandedBanner: Expanded to nearby El Boton users

history.title: History
history.subtitle: Your alerts and responses
history.noAlertsHint: Alerts you create or respond to will appear here
